title: 26-9510 - Villa-Arreola v. Blanche
text:
Appellate Case: 26-9510 Document: 11 Date Filed: 04/07/2026 Page: 1
FILED
United States Court of Appeals
Tenth Circuit
UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS
April 7, 2026
FOR THE TENTH CIRCUIT
_________________________________
Christopher M. Wolpert
Clerk of Court
VICTOR VILLA-ARREOLA,
Petitioner,
v. No. 26-9510
(Petition for Review)
TODD BLANCHE∗, Acting United States
Attorney General,
Respondent.
_________________________________
ORDER
_________________________________
This petition for review is dismissed for lack of prosecution pursuant to Tenth
Circuit Rules 3.3(B) and 42.1. A copy of this order shall stand as and for the mandate of
the court.
Entered for the Court
CHRISTOPHER M. WOLPERT, Clerk
∗ Todd Blanche is substituted as the respondent pursuant to Fed. R. App. P.
43(c)(2).
court_name: United States Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit
parties: Victor Villa-Arreola, Petitioner Todd Blanche, Respondent Pamela J. Bondi, Respondent
docket_text: [11270730] Default;Procedural termination without judicial action;Clerk of the Court. [26-9510]
